metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for AI agent orchestration, writing, and style analysis

plugins.name: stilwerk
plugins.description: Style analysis, authorship attribution, and text transformation. Combines quantitative stylometry with AI-assisted qualitative analysis.

plugins.name: fusion
plugins.description: Multi-domain AI agent orchestration framework. 16 project-agnostic specialized agents (3 parameterised by domain — code/data/strategic/knowledge; investigator parameterised by a project-supplied capture-layout rule) with a compliance guard, churn detection, decision-record tracking, a real-time browser-based monitor with session-scoped ETA estimation, and an optional push-only Plane work-queue mirror. /fusion:help inside Claude Code for self-explainer.

plugins.name: flight
plugins.description: Lightweight AI work companion for non-technical users. One general-purpose agent (pilot) for analyzing documents, discussing topics, and producing precise, well-styled written outputs. Includes session-close compaction, open-task tracking via CLAUDE.md, and built-in professional-voice and chat-voice style guides (English + German). /flight:help inside Claude Code for self-explainer. Dispatch with `claude --agent flight:pilot`.
